tools.name: locations.mybusinessplaceactionsLocationsPlaceActionLinksCreate
tools.description: Creates a place action link associated with the specified location, and returns it. The request is considered duplicate if the `parent`, `place_action_link.uri` and `place_action_link.place_action_type` are the same as a previous request.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessplaceactionsLocationsPlaceActionLinksDelete
tools.description: Deletes a place action link from the specified location.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessplaceactionsLocationsPlaceActionLinksGet
tools.description: Gets the specified place action link.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessplaceactionsLocationsPlaceActionLinksList
tools.description: Lists the place action links for the specified location.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessplaceactionsLocationsPlaceActionLinksPatch
tools.description: Updates the specified place action link and returns it.

tools.name: placeActionTypeMetadata.mybusinessplaceactionsPlaceActionTypeMetadataList
tools.description: Returns the list of available place action types for a location or country.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
